prompt_task: We wish to find the chromatin states overlapping the peaks in the given ENCODE narrowpeak bed file ENCFF333TAT.bed.gz. We have a ChromHMM annotation bed file E055_15_coreMarks_dense.bed.gz. What percentage of all bases in the peaks overlap with the 14_ReprPCWk annotation? Ignore bases in the peak file that don't have any corresponding annotation in the annotation file. Round to the nearest integer. Output format: "42". Run the analysis inside the Galaxy environment.
